title: Tier / pricing cards
description: Side-by-side plan/tier cards with feature lists, price, and optional CTA. Maps to the _layout_tier_pricing_cards content contract from layouts.py and the card block kind.

props.name: tiers
props.description: Array of tier objects: {name, price, features[], cta?}. Min 2, max 4 cards recommended.

props.name: highlight
props.description: Name of the tier to visually emphasise (brand accent border and top bar).

props.name: currency
props.description: Currency symbol prefix for the price display.

props.name: accent
props.description: Brand color token for accent elements (highlighted card border, CTA button).
